name: Paximadia: Greek Walnut Cookie Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. These are very similar to biscotti but are not necessarily twice baked. I make this at Christmas time for my Greek friends.
2. Beat oil and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Combine remaining ingredients and mix into creamed mixture with a wooden spoon.
5. Form dough into 4 oval loaves on a baking sheet.
6. Score the dough into 1/2-inch slices.
7. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes or until done.
8. Slice completely through while warm and cool completely.
9. These freeze well. If you want a harder cookie, return just baked cookies to the oven, reducing heat to 200°F and baking for 20 minutes longer.
